ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the trial */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the trial */,
  "xt" REAL /* X-coordinate transformed */,
  "yt" REAL /* Y-coordinate transformed */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the trial */,
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the trial */,
  "sub_task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sub-task of the trial */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the condition of the trial */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message or annotation for the trial */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the trial */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trial was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trial */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the researcher who conducted the trial */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment to which the trial belongs */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_trial_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_type_id") REFERENCES trial_types ("trial_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_sub_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_task_id") REFERENCES sub_tasks ("sub_task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_types" (
  "trial_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial type */,
  "trial_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the trial type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the trial type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trial type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the trial type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_tasks" (
  "sub_task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-task */,
  "sub_task_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the sub-task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sub-task was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sub-task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the researcher was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
